items.title: Working at the frontier: How Cursor knew Claude Fable 5 was ready for the hardest 1% of problems
items.summary_en: Cursor's evaluation of the Claude “Fable 5” model addressed the challenge of determining whether an AI coding assistant could reliably solve elite, frontier‑level software tasks—the hardest 1% of problems. Through rigorous internal benchmarking focused on extreme difficulty, Cursor verified that the model’s capabilities met the demanding threshold for these rare, complex challenges. This assessment matters because it signals that AI tools are now crossing into high‑stakes development work that previously required human expert intuition, enabling developers to tackle the most difficult coding problems with AI assistance.
items.summary_zh: Working at the frontier: How Cursor knew Claude Fable 5 was ready for the hardest 1% of problems
items.title_en: Working at the frontier: How Cursor knew Claude Fable 5 was ready for the hardest 1% of problems

items.title: Zero risk isn't the job: a CISO's guide to agentic AI
items.summary_en: This guide tackles the unrealistic expectation of achieving zero risk in cybersecurity for autonomous AI agents, arguing that agentic AI’s inherent unpredictability makes perfect safety unattainable. It reframes the CISO’s role toward continuous risk management and adaptive governance, a critical shift because clinging to zero-risk deters beneficial AI
items.summary_zh: 该指南针对首席信息安全官在部署自主式AI智能体时面临的困境，指出彻底消除风险并不现实。其核心观点是安全负责人必须抛弃“零风险”思维，转向主动的风险管理，在创新与安全之间做出权衡。这之所以重要，是因为它帮助企业在不因恐惧而停滞的前提下，负责任地引入AI智能体。
items.title_en: Zero risk isn't the job: a CISO's guide to agentic AI

items.title: Ep 91: Top AI Analyst Unpacks Today's AI Hype Cycle
items.summary_en: The problem is that naive comparisons of AI's scale to past platform shifts (internet, mobile, PCs) are analytically unproductive for forecasting its impact. Benedict Evans argues that the more useful approach is to study how those earlier technologies evolved economically to reason about where AI's value will accumulate, while noting that the key differentiator is the absence of known physical or scientific limits. This matters because it shifts the debate from hype-driven scale analogies to structural economic reasoning, highlighting the unprecedented uncertainty in AI's eventual reach.
items.summary_zh: 分析师Benedict Evans指出，简单将AI与互联网、移动等历史平台进行规模比较没有意义，核心方法应是研究以往技术经济演变的路径，来推断AI的价值将沉淀在何处。他真正的关键发现是，AI目前没有已知的物理或科学极限，这构成了与过往技术浪潮的本质区别，从而提醒人们应基于经济规律而非盲目对比来理性评估AI的商业机遇。
items.title_en: Ep 91: Top AI Analyst Unpacks Today's AI Hype Cycle

items.title: Index Ventures 联合创始人 Neil Rimer 认为 AI 财富将面临"再分配"
items.summary_en: Neil Rimer argues that the massive wealth generated by AI will inevitably undergo redistribution, either voluntarily or through government intervention, and urges tech leaders to take the lead in shaping this process. His comments come as U.S. charitable giving reaches a record high even as the number of donors declines, and as California considers a one-time 5% tax on billionaires.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了人工智能创造的巨额财富可能加剧社会不平等的问题。核心发现是，Index Ventures 联合创始人 Neil Rimer 警告这种财富将面临自愿或被动的“再分配”，并呼吁科技领袖主动引领这一过程，其重要性在于，鉴于美国慈善捐赠人数下滑及加州拟征亿万富翁财富税等现实压力，这凸显了科技行业需采取行动以避免更严苛的强制政策出台。
items.title_zh: Index Ventures 联合创始人 Neil Rimer 认为 AI 财富将面临"再分配"

items.title: Apple 起诉 OpenAI：诉讼背后是竞争焦虑还是时机博弈？
items.summary_en: The article examines Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI, questioning whether it signals competitive anxiety over OpenAI’s potential threat or a strategic play to capitalize on OpenAI’s weaknesses. The timing—coinciding with Apple’s launch of its own Siri AI beta—fuels speculation that Apple may be leveraging legal action to gain an edge in the accelerating AI race, even as experts note some of the accusations are industry norms.
items.summary_zh: 苹果在发布以新Siri AI为核心的公测版软件之际起诉OpenAI，外界质疑其动机究竟是担忧OpenAI成为竞争对手，还是趁机在对方弱势期获利。此举不仅涉及对行业惯例的争议，更凸显了科技巨头间复杂的竞争博弈与时机选择。
items.title_zh: Apple 起诉 OpenAI：诉讼背后是竞争焦虑还是时机博弈？

items.title: 月之暗面在GTC 2026披露Kimi K2.5技术路线：用MuonClip、线性注意力与Agent Swarm重构三大基础组件
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI’s CEO revealed the K2.5 roadmap, replacing Adam with the MuonClip optimizer to nearly double data efficiency, introducing Kimi Linear attention that surpasses full attention at million-token context lengths, and scaling Agent Swarm to 300 parallel agents. These advances tackle computational bottlenecks and long-context reasoning, paving the way for more efficient, large-scale, and collaborative AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 该演讲披露了月之暗面在提升大模型训练效率、扩展超长上下文处理以及多智能体协作方面的三项基础技术重构：用数据利用效率更高的MuonClip优化器替代Adam，使长上下文建模在百万token规模上超越全注意力的Kimi Linear线性注意力，以及支持300个智能体并行的Agent Swarm框架。这些创新分别针对当前大模型训练成本高、长文本能力损失和复杂任务协同难的问题，有望从底层推动更高效、更可扩展的AI系统构建。
items.title_zh: 月之暗面在GTC 2026披露Kimi K2.5技术路线：用MuonClip、线性注意力与Agent Swarm重构三大基础组件

items.title: 八天四款前沿模型发布，Kimi K3 跻身第三
items.summary_en: In the span of just eight days, the
items.summary_zh: 近期八天内四款前沿模型集中发布，Kimi K3 跻身智能指数前三，使评分超 50 的实验室从 2 家增至 6 家。这反映出 AI 竞赛急剧升温，模型能力快速跃升，推动行业整体进入更高水平的密集迭代阶段。
items.title_zh: 八天四款前沿模型发布，Kimi K3 跻身第三

items.title: Sora 2 视频克隆效果惊人，真假难辨
items.summary_en: This showcases Sora 2's breakthrough in video cloning, achieving near-perfect replication of nuanced human motion and facial expressions that makes individual frames indistinguishable from real footage. The finding highlights a critical leap in generative realism, demonstrating that current deepfake detection methods may be fundamentally outpaced, with profound implications for visual media trust.
items.summary_zh: 该研究展示了Sora 2在视频深度克隆上的惊人突破，能够精准复现面部肌肉运动和步态等细微特征，达到单帧画面完全无法分辨真伪的水平。这一发现表明视频生成技术已逼近完全拟真边界，对未来内容鉴真与媒体伦理构成重大挑战。
items.title_zh: Sora 2 视频克隆效果惊人，真假难辨

items.title: 美团LongCat发布LoHoSearch：更难搜索智能体基准
items.summary_en: LoHoSearch addresses the saturation of existing search agent benchmarks like BrowseComp by introducing a harder evaluation set auto-generated from a large Wikipedia knowledge graph. The benchmark’s 544 questions, spanning 11 domains and using tree/graph structures, challenge state-of-the-art models that achieve only 34.74% (versus ~90% on BrowseComp), with context augmentation yielding marginal gains. This publicly available benchmark pushes the frontier for testing long-context, multi-hop reasoning in search agents.
items.summary_zh: 美团LongCat推出的LoHoSearch基准针对BrowseComp等现有搜索智能体评测趋于饱和的难题，基于包含762万实体的知识图谱自动生成544道多领域高难度问题，将评测从简单检索提升到需要复杂推理的图结构搜索。测试显示，11个前沿模型的最佳得分仅34.74%，远低于此前约90%的表现，表明该基准能有效暴露模型在深层知识关联和策略性搜索上的不足，为研发更强搜索智能体提供了关键评测工具。
items.title_zh: 美团LongCat发布LoHoSearch：更难搜索智能体基准

items.title: LLM cliché highlighter：一款识别AI写作套话的检测工具
items.summary_en: Simon Willison’s LLM cliché highlighter addresses the growing problem of AI-generated text saturated with formulaic phrases by using a Fable 5 app to automatically detect and highlight ten common cliché patterns. This tool empowers readers to quickly spot and filter out stylized AI writing, promoting more critical consumption of content.
items.summary_zh: 该工具针对AI生成文本中频繁出现的套话现象，通过高亮“no fluff, no filler, no jargon”等十种陈词滥调模式，帮助读者快速察觉并过滤这些机械化表达，提升对AI写作风格的辨识力。
items.title_zh: LLM cliché highlighter：一款识别AI写作套话的检测工具

items.title: 苹果与 OpenAI 法律战升级：约 40 名前员工收到苹果律师函
items.summary_en: Apple escalates its legal fight against OpenAI by issuing preservation letters to ~40 former employees, alleging that OpenAI’s poaching of over 400 ex-Apple personnel aims to misappropriate trade secrets and accelerate AI hardware research. This case highlights the fierce battle for AI talent and could reshape how courts balance intellectual property protection with employee mobility in the competitive AI hardware sector.
items.summary_zh: 苹果与OpenAI的法律纠纷升级，苹果指控OpenAI通过挖走约40名前员工窃取商业机密用于加速AI硬件研发，并已发出律师函要求保存文件。苹果称已有超400名前员工在OpenAI任职，正寻求法院禁令阻止对方使用其机密信息，此举旨在保护核心技术资产，凸显科技巨头间激烈的人才争夺与知识产权战。
items.title_zh: 苹果与 OpenAI 法律战升级：约 40 名前员工收到苹果律师函

items.title: OpenAI 提出 AI 时代记分卡："有用智能每美元"衡量实际工作价值
items.summary_en: OpenAI addresses the inadequacy of traditional benchmarks by proposing "Useful Intelligence per Dollar" to measure the real-world return on AI investments. The metric evaluates the amount of useful work accomplished, the actual cost per successful task, and the reliability of outputs, shifting focus from raw capability to practical productivity. This framework matters because it provides a clear, cost-aware scorecard for guiding AI deployment and investment decisions.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI针对AI投资回报难以量化的问题，提出以“有用智能每美元”为核心的新指标，通过综合考虑实际完成的有用任务量、成功执行的成本及结果可靠性，来更精准地评估AI系统产生的实际工作价值。这一框架打破了仅看模型能力的传统评估方式，直接聚焦于单位成本的产出效率，对指导企业和研究界合理配置AI资源、追求真正的投资回报具有重要意义。
items.title_zh: OpenAI 提出 AI 时代记分卡："有用智能每美元"衡量实际工作价值

items.title: 首届"小有可为"大赛乡村教育一等奖作品"智绘科普"技术拆解
items.summary_en: The “Zhihui Kepu” system tackles the challenge of producing high-quality educational animations for rural settings by orchestrating the Qwen3.5-397B-A17B large language model and the Manim animation engine through a five-stage multi-agent pipeline with automatic error extraction and repair, turning knowledge topics into controllable, editable animations. This robust, transferable paradigm offers a scalable approach to automated content creation that can benefit multiple domains.
items.summary_zh: 该作品针对乡村教育资源匮乏问题，通过 Qwen3.5 大模型与 Manim 动画引擎的多 Agent 协作，将任意知识主题自动转化为教学动画，并引入渲染失败自动修复机制以保障产出稳定性。其分阶段规划—实现—审查—合成的工程范式具有高度可迁移性，为低成本、可伸缩的智能教育资源生成提供了新路径。
items.title_zh: 首届"小有可为"大赛乡村教育一等奖作品"智绘科普"技术拆解

items.title: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.19.11-nightly.20260718.767a32484
items.summary_en: This nightly release addresses cold-start performance profiling and multi-workspace security hardening in the Qwen code daemon and serve components. It adds tracing for first-session daemon startup to aid latency debugging, and strengthens ownership guards plus documentation to prevent unauthorized cross-workspace access. These changes improve both developer observability and production-ready isolation, reducing risks in multi-tenant code execution environments.
items.summary_zh: 此版本专注于提升守护进程冷启动时的性能可观测性，通过跟踪首次会话启动过程来定位瓶颈；同时加强了服务端多工作空间的所有权安全守卫，修复了相关文档缺口。这些改进对于改善开发者体验和保障多用户环境下的数据安全至关重要。

items.title: MoonshotAI/kimi-code: @moonshot-ai/kimi-code@0.27.0
items.summary_en:
### Minor Changes

- [#1822](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code/pull/1822) [`a5c568d`](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code/commit/a5c568dc7a84962bae70a16858709c453fc90a07) Thanks [@liruifengv](https://github.com/liruifengv)! - Add the /copy slash command to copy the last assistant message t
items.summary_zh: kimi-code 0.27.0 版本新增了 `/copy` 斜杠命令，用于一键将上一次助手回复的内容复制到剪贴板，解决了开发者频繁手动选中复制的低效问题。这一改进以极简的交互方式提升了 AI 辅助编程的连贯性与操作效率。
